ruqyahDisclaimer:
⚠️ La Roqya est tirée du Saint Coran et de la Sunna prophétique.
Cette section est destinée à l'écoute et à la protection, pas un substitut au traitement médical.

zakatNoteText: Ce calculateur utilise le Nisab de l'argent (595g) qui est inférieur, dans l'intérêt des pauvres selon la majorité des savants. Le taux fixe de Zakat est de 2,5% de la richesse totale.

mosqueEntryDua: Doua pour entrer à la mosquée
watchVideosForPoints: Regardez des vidéos pour des points gratuits
buyWithGold: Achetez des articles premium avec de l'or
duaSleep1: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live
duaSleep2: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants
duaSleep3: In Your name, my Lord, I lay my side down, and by You I raise it. If You take my soul, have mercy on it, and if You release it, protect it as You protect Your righteous servants
duaSleep4: O Allah, You created my soul and You take it back. To You belongs its death and its life. If You give it life, protect it, and if You cause it to die, forgive it. O Allah, I ask You for well-being
duaSleep5: O Allah, Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth and Lord of the Mighty Throne, our Lord and Lord of all things, Splitter of grain and seeds, Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel and the Quran, I seek refuge in You from the evil of everything whose forelock is in Your Hand
duaWudu2: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger
duaWudu3: O Allah, make me among those who repent and make me among those who purify themselves
duaWudu4: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise be to You. I bear witness that there is no god but You, I seek Your forgiveness and repent to You
duaMosque1: O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy
duaMosque2: I seek refuge in Allah the Almighty, and in His Noble Face, and in His eternal authority, from the accursed Satan
duaMosque3: In the name of Allah, and prayers and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, forgive me my sins and open for me the gates of Your mercy
duaSalah1: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise be to You. Blessed is Your name, exalted is Your majesty, and there is no god but You
duaSalah2: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire
duaSalah3: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the punishment of Hellfire, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the Antichrist
duaSalah4: My Lord, make me and my offspring those who establish prayer. Our Lord, accept my supplication
duaHome1: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we rely
duaHome2: O Allah, I ask You for the good of entering and the good of leaving. In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we rely
duaClothes1: All praise is for Allah who has clothed me with this garment and provided it for me without any power or strength from me
duaClothes2: O Allah, I ask You for its good and the good it was made for, and I seek refuge from its evil and the evil it was made for
duaTravel1: Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could not have done it ourselves. And to our Lord we shall surely return
duaTravel2: O Allah, we ask You for righteousness and piety in this journey, and we ask You for deeds that please You. O Allah, make this journey easy for us and fold its distance. O Allah, You are the Companion on the journey and the Guardian of the family
duaTravel3: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the hardships of travel, from the sorrows of return, from the scene of decline after prosperity, from the supplication of the oppressed, and from seeing evil befall family and property
duaFood2: In the name of Allah, at its beginning and at its end
duaFood3: All praise is for Allah who has fed us, given us drink, and made us Muslims
duaFood4: All praise is for Allah who has fed me this food and provided it for me without any power or strength from me
duaDhikr4: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things
duaRevival2: O Controller of hearts, make my heart steadfast upon Your religion
duaRevival3: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds
duaRevival4: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency
duaAfterPrayer1: أستغفر الله، أستغفر الله، أستغفر الله
duaAfterPrayer2: اللهم أنت السلام ومنك السلام تباركت يا ذا الجلال والإكرام
duaAfterPrayer3: سبحان الله (٣٣) والحمد لله (٣٣) والله أكبر (٣٣)
duaAfterPrayer4: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له، له الملك وله الحمد وهو على كل شيء قدير
duaAfterPrayer5: اللهم أعني على ذكرك وشكرك وحسن عبادتك
duaRizq1: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from weakness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being overwhelmed by debt and overpowered by men
duaRizq2: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and enrich me by Your favor against all others
duaRizq3: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens, Lord of the Mighty Throne, be sufficient for me against everything, provide for me from where I expect not, O Allah, provide us with what is good
duaKnowledge1: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge
duaKnowledge2: My Lord, increase me in knowledge
duaKnowledge3: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds
duaFaith1: O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness in my affairs, and determination in guidance. I ask You for gratitude for Your blessings and good worship of You
duaFaith2: O Allah, make faith beloved to us and beautify it in our hearts, and make disbelief, wickedness, and disobedience hateful to us. Make us among the rightly guided
duaFaith3: ربنا لا تزغ قلوبنا بعد إذ هديتنا وهب لنا من لدنك رحمة إنك أنت الوهاب
duaJudgment1: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and what brings me closer to it of words and deeds, and I seek refuge in You from the Fire and what brings me closer to it of words and deeds
duaJudgment2: O Allah, make my accounting easy
duaForgiveness1: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no god but You. You created me and I am Your servant. I am upon Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your blessings upon me and I acknowledge my sins. So forgive me, for none forgives sins except You
duaForgiveness2: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy on us, we will surely be among the losers
duaForgiveness3: I seek forgiveness from Allah the Almighty, there is no god but He, the Living, the Self-Sustaining, and I repent to Him
duaPraising1: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him, as many times as the number of His creation, to the extent of His pleasure, to the weight of His Throne, and to the extent of the ink of His words
duaPraising2: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise. He gives life and causes death, and He has power over all things
duaPraising3: سبحان الله عدد خلقه، سبحان الله رضا نفسه، سبحان الله زنة عرشه، سبحان الله مداد كلماته
duaFamily1: Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us leaders of the righteous
duaFamily2: My Lord, make me grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents, and to do righteousness of which You approve
duaFamily3: O Allah, put love between our hearts and reconcile between us
duaHealth1: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the illness. Cure, for You are the Healer. There is no cure except Your cure, a cure that leaves no sickness
duaHealth2: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from going astray or being led astray, from slipping or being caused to slip, from wronging or being wronged, from behaving ignorantly or being treated ignorantly
duaHealth3: بسم الله أرقيك، من كل شيء يؤذيك، من شر كل نفس أو عين حاسد الله يشفيك
duaLoss1: To Allah we belong and to Him we shall return. O Allah, reward me for my affliction and replace it with something better
duaLoss2: Indeed, to Allah belongs what He has taken, and to Him belongs what He has given. Everything has an appointed time with Him, so be patient and seek reward from Allah
duaLoss3: اللهم لا سهل إلا ما جعلته سهلاً وأنت تجعل الحزن إذا شئت سهلاً
duaSadness1: O Allah, I am Your servant, the son of Your servant, the son of Your female servant. My forelock is in Your hand. Your command concerning me prevails, and Your decree concerning me is just. I ask You by every name that belongs to You, with which You named Yourself, or revealed in Your Book, or taught to any of Your creation, or kept in the knowledge of the unseen with You, to make the Quran the spring of my heart, the light of my chest, the departure of my sadness, and the relief of my anxiety
duaSadness2: There is no god but You. Glory be to You, indeed I have been among the wrongdoers
duaPatience1: O Allah, there is no ease except what You have made easy, and You make difficulty easy if You wish
duaPatience2: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs
duaDebt1: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from weakness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being overwhelmed by debt and overpowered by men
duaMens3: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له
duaDeceased1: O Allah, forgive them and have mercy on them, grant them well-being and pardon them. Honor their abode and make their entrance wide, wash them with water, snow, and ice, and purify them from sins as a white garment is purified from filth
duaDeceased2: O Allah, forgive our living and our dead, those present and those absent, our young and our old, our males and our females
duaDeceased3: اللهم لا تحرمنا أجره ولا تفتنا بعده واغفر لنا وله
duaHajj1: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Indeed, all praise, grace, and sovereignty belong to You. You have no partner
duaHajj2: O Allah, this is Your House which You have made sacred. So make my visit righteous, my pilgrimage accepted, and my sins forgiven
duaRamadan1: O Allah, You are Forgiving, You love forgiveness, so forgive me
duaRamadan2: O Allah, I fasted for You, and with Your provision I break my fast. The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is established, if Allah wills
duaRamadan3: اللهم إني لك صمت وعلى رزقك أفطرت
duaNature1: O Allah, make it a beneficial rain
duaNature2: O Allah, around us and not upon us. O Allah, upon the hills, mountains, valleys, and places where trees grow
duaNature3: اللهم إني أسألك خيرها وخير ما فيها وخير ما أرسلت به وأعوذ بك من شرها وشر ما فيها وشر ما أرسلت به
duaManners1: اللهم اهدني لأحسن الأخلاق لا يهدي لأحسنها إلا أنت واصرف عني سيئها لا يصرف عني سيئها إلا أنت
duaManners2: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من منكرات الأخلاق والأعمال والأهواء
duaGuidance1: O Allah, I seek Your guidance through Your knowledge, and I seek Your ability through Your power, and I ask You from Your immense favor. You have power while I have none. You know while I do not, and You are the Knower of the unseen
duaGuidance2: O Allah, show me the truth as truth and grant me the ability to follow it, and show me falsehood as falsehood and grant me the ability to avoid it
duaSleepBefore6: O Allah, I have submitted my soul to You, entrusted my affairs to You, turned my face to You, and laid my back to You, out of desire and fear of You. There is no refuge and no escape from You except to You. I believe in Your Book which You have revealed and in Your Prophet whom You have sent
duaWakeUp1: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having caused us to die, and unto Him is the resurrection
duaWakeUp2: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things. Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, there is no god but Allah, Allah is the Greatest, and there is no might or power except with Allah, the Most High, the Most Great
duaNightmare1: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and punishment, from the evil of His servants, and from the whispers of the devils and from their presence
duaNightmare2: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan
duaMosqueLeave1: بسم الله والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله، اللهم إني أسألك من فضلك
duaHomeLeave1: بسم الله، توكلت على الله، ولا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله
duaHomeLeave2: اللهم إني أعوذ بك أن أضل أو أُضل أو أزل أو أُزل أو أظلم أو أُظلم أو أجهل أو يُجهل علي
duaClothesSee2: البس جديداً وعش حميداً ومت شهيداً
duaTravelReturn2: اللهم إني أسألك خير المولج وخير المخرج
duaVehicle1: سبحان الذي سخر لنا هذا وما كنا له مقرنين وإنا إلى ربنا لمنقلبون
duaFoodBefore2: اللهم بارك لنا فيما رزقتنا وقنا عذاب النار
duaDrink1: اللهم بارك لنا فيه وزدنا منه
duaGuestFood1: اللهم بارك لهم فيما رزقتهم واغفر لهم وارحمهم
duaGuestFood2: أفطر عندكم الصائمون وأكل طعامكم الأبرار وصلت عليكم الملائكة
duaMorning1: اللهم عافني في بدني، اللهم عافني في سمعي، اللهم عافني في بصري، لا إله إلا أنت
duaEvening1: أمسينا وأمسى الملك لله والحمد لله، لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له
duaEvening2: اللهم بك أمسينا وبك أصبحنا وبك نحيا وبك نموت وإليك المصير
duaEvening3: اللهم ما أمسى بي من نعمة أو بأحد من خلقك فمنك وحدك لا شريك لك، فلك الحمد ولك الشكر
duaProtection1: بسم الله الذي لا يضر مع اسمه شيء في الأرض ولا في السماء وهو السميع العليم
duaProtection2: حسبي الله لا إله إلا هو عليه توكلت وهو رب العرش العظيم
duaSalawat1: اللهم صلِّ وسلم على نبينا محمد
duaSalawat2: اللهم صلِّ على محمد وعلى آل محمد كما صليت على إبراهيم وعلى آل إبراهيم إنك حميد مجيد
duaDebt2: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and enrich me by Your favor against all others
duaExam1: رب اشرح لي صدري ويسر لي أمري واحلل عقدة من لساني يفقهوا قولي
duaExam2: اللهم لا سهل إلا ما جعلته سهلاً وأنت تجعل الحزن إذا شئت سهلاً
duaParents2: ربنا اغفر لي ولوالدي وللمؤمنين يوم يقوم الحساب
duaSpouse1: اللهم بارك لهما وبارك عليهما واجمع بينهما في خير
duaVisitSick1: لا بأس طهور إن شاء الله
duaRuqyah1: بسم الله (ثلاثاً) أعوذ بالله وقدرته من شر ما أجد وأحاذر
duaHappy1: الحمد لله الذي بنعمته تتم الصالحات
duaHappy2: اللهم لك الحمد كما ينبغي لجلال وجهك وعظيم سلطانك
duaCondolence1: إن لله ما أخذ وله ما أعطى وكل شيء عنده بأجل مسمى فلتصبر ولتحتسب
duaGrave1: السلام عليكم أهل الديار من المؤمنين والمسلمين، وإنا إن شاء الله بكم لاحقون، نسأل الله لنا ولكم العافية
duaSai1: إن الصفا والمروة من شعائر الله
duaArafat1: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له، له الملك وله الحمد وهو على كل شيء قدير
duaSuhoor1: نويت صوم غد من شهر رمضان
ramadanCalendarDesc: Duas quotidiennes • Laylat al-Qadr • Suhoor & Iftar
ruqyahAyatKursiDesc: Pour la protection et la préservation
goalRepentance: Pour le repentir et le pardon
goalSurahMulk: Lire Sourate Al-Mulk avant de dormir
enableNotifDesc: Active les notifications pour les rappels d'Athan
quranPlayerDesc: Joue n'importe quelle sourate avec répétition ou lecture automatique
repeatAllSurahs: 🔁 Lecture automatique de toutes les sourates
autoNextSurah: ➡️ Passage automatique à la sourate suivante
audioErrorReciter: Échec de la lecture — essayez un autre récitateur
audioNotAvailable: Audio du récitateur non disponible — essayez un autre récitateur
locationErrorMsg: Veuillez activer la localisation pour afficher les heures de prière
gdprDesc: Nous utilisons la publicité pour soutenir l'application et la garder gratuite. Conformément au droit européen (RGPD), nous avons besoin de votre consentement pour afficher des publicités personnalisées.
gdprCollect2: Type de contenu avec lequel vous interagissez
gdprCollect3: Données de base de l'appareil pour améliorer l'expérience publicitaire
gdprChangeNote: Vous pouvez modifier vos préférences à tout moment dans les paramètres

permLocationBenefit1: Heures de prière précises pour votre ville et région
permLocationBenefit2: Direction Qibla correcte depuis votre position actuelle
permLocationBenefit3: Trouver les mosquées les plus proches
permLocationBenefit4: Déterminer la méthode de calcul appropriée pour votre pays
permNotifSubtitle: Pour vous alerter des heures de prière et des Adhkar
permNotifBenefit1: Son de l'Athan à l'heure de la prière
permNotifBenefit2: Adhkar du matin et du soir à leurs heures
permPrivacyNote: Votre vie privée nous importe • Nous ne partageons pas vos données avec des tiers
writeYourStory: Partagez votre histoire ou un sujet islamique...
pasteVideoLink: Collez un lien YouTube ou vidéo
noContent: Pas de contenu, suivez des utilisateurs et créez du contenu !
prayerRemindersDesc: Alerte avant l'heure de la prière
athanAlertDesc: Jouer l'Athan à l'heure de la prière
morningAdhkarDesc: Rappel quotidien des Adhkar du matin
eveningAdhkarDesc: Rappel quotidien des Adhkar du soir
generalNotifsDesc: Actualités et mises à jour de l'application
discoverStories: Découvrez des histoires — partagez vos moments de foi avec la Oumma
eveningAdhkarReminder: N'oubliez pas les Adhkar du soir
startConversation: Commencez une conversation avec vos amis
activityWillAppear: Apparaîtra ici quand quelqu'un interagira avec vos publications
loginPromptDesc: Pour recevoir des notifications et messages de vos amis
searchNearbyMosqueDesc: Recherchez votre mosquée proche et sélectionnez ses horaires
compassStep1: Placez le téléphone à plat horizontalement sur votre paume
compassStep2: Éloignez-vous des métaux et appareils électroniques (casque, ordinateur)
compassStep3: Pour calibrer: Bougez le téléphone en forme de 8 plusieurs fois
compassStep4: Tournez votre corps jusqu'à ce que 🕋 apparaisse en haut et que la couleur devienne verte
enableCompassBtn: Appuyez ici pour activer la boussole
compassUnavailableDesc: Votre appareil ne prend pas en charge la boussole numérique ou vous utilisez un navigateur de bureau. Utilisez l'angle affiché avec une boussole externe ou une application de cartes.
lowAccuracyMsg: Précision de la boussole faible - bougez le téléphone en ∞
movePhone8Pattern: Bougez votre téléphone en forme de 8...
noLocationDetected: Position non détectée - activez les services de localisation
appSubtitle: Horaires de prière • Histoires inspirantes • Vie islamique
watchAdForCredits: Regardez une publicité pour obtenir des crédits
installDesc: Ajoutez l'application à votre écran d'accueil
installStep2: Appuyez sur le bouton de partage
pageNotFoundDesc: La page que vous cherchez n'existe pas
shareIdea: Partagez votre idée avec la communauté... ✨
notifPrayerAlertsDesc: Notification à chaque heure de prière
notifPrayerReminderDesc: Rappel quelques minutes avant la prière
notifFridayDesc: Rappel de lire la Sourate Al-Kahf chaque vendredi
allowNotifBrowser: Veuillez autoriser les notifications dans les paramètres du navigateur
bgNotifEnabled: Notifications en arrière-plan activées ✅ Vous les recevrez même lorsque l'application est fermée
bgNotifFailed: Impossible d'activer les notifications en arrière-plan
enableLocationFirst: Veuillez d'abord activer la localisation pour les horaires de prière
bgAthanNotifDesc: Activez les notifications pour recevoir les alertes d'Athan même lorsque l'application est fermée
tryDifferent: Essayez des mots différents ou utilisez la recherche vocale 🎤
tapShareBtn: Appuyez sur le bouton de partage ⎋
zakatCurrencySubtitle: Choisissez la devise de votre pays
zakatAssetsSubtitle: Entrez la valeur de chaque type d'actif dans la devise sélectionnée
zakatBelowNisab: Vos fonds sont en dessous du Nisab
zakatLegalText: Ce calculateur est basé sur le Nisab d'argent (595 grammes), qui est le seuil le plus bas, en faveur des pauvres selon la majorité des savants. Le taux fixe de Zakat est de 2,5% de la richesse totale qui a atteint le Nisab et une année complète s'est écoulée.
duaAfterSalah1: I seek forgiveness from Allah (three times). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor
duaAfterSalah2: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things. O Allah, none can prevent what You give, and none can give what You prevent, and the fortune of the fortunate avails not against You
duaAfterSalah3: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things. There is no might or power except with Allah. There is no god but Allah, and we worship none but Him. To Him belongs blessing and grace and beautiful praise. There is no god but Allah, being sincere in religion to Him even though the disbelievers may detest it
duaDhikr6: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him, Glory be to Allah the Almighty
duaDhikr7: There is no might or power except with Allah
duaDhikr8: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad
duaPostPrayer1: Glory be to Allah (33 times), All praise is for Allah (33 times), Allah is the Greatest (33 times), then say to complete 100: There is no god but Allah alone with no partner, to Him belongs sovereignty and praise and He has power over all things
duaPostPrayer2: Ayat al-Kursi: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining...
duaMenstruation1: All praise is for Allah in all conditions
